company.name: New World Kids
company.description: Mission-first platform for food, water, energy, shelter, public trust, and field media.
company.mission: Help people understand the work quickly, verify the proof easily, and support the mission without friction.

goals.title: Production donor experience
goals.description: Ship a donor-facing site that explains the four pillars in seconds, surfaces trust visibly, and makes giving simple.

goals.title: Public proof engine
goals.description: Run a separate journal and trust center with article-scoped chat and durable verification documents.

goals.title: Transparent operations and outreach
goals.description: Keep grants moving, publish field updates, and mirror meaningful agent work into a durable public ledger.

goals.title: Agent-native nonprofit backend
goals.description: Operate the backend as a Hermes harness with tool access, scoped automation, and explicit approval gates.

agents.name: Hermes
agents.description: Owns donor trust, orchestration, public proof, and backend policy across the site, journal, and grant pipeline.

agents.name: Grant Hunter
agents.description: Finds grants, drafts applications, and routes approvals for major submissions.

agents.name: Trust Steward
agents.description: Maintains trust docs, public proof pages, and verification copy.

agents.name: Content Engine
agents.description: Publishes journal notes, campaign updates, and bilingual public proof.

projects.name: Mission-first production release
projects.description: Move the site from prototype shape to production donor flow with trust, journal, and backend separation.

tasks.title: Launch trust center
tasks.description: Keep verification documents visible, accurate, and easy to reach.

tasks.title: Publish four-pillar journal
tasks.description: Keep food, water, energy, and shelter stories live in EN and ES.

tasks.title: Run grant pipeline
tasks.description: Pursue aligned grants and prepare approval-ready drafts.

tasks.title: Maintain public action trail
tasks.description: Keep material automation work visible in a durable report sink while the full public ledger evolves.
